html:
Malora Hightower
the Mad Maid
Malora Hightower (with her father Leyton), by Dreamsofdany ©
Alias The Mad Maid
Allegiance House Hightower
Culture Reach
Born Oldtown[1]
Father Leyton Hightower
Book A Feast for Crows (mentioned)

Malora Hightower, called the Mad Maid, is a noblewoman of House Hightower and the eldest daughter of Lord Leyton Hightower of Oldtown.[2]

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 2 Family
  • 3 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

After the taking of the Shields and the ironborn's attacks on the Reach, the captain of the Huntress reports that Lord Leyton Hightower is locked at the top of the Hightower, consulting books of spells with the Mad Maid.[3]
